PROMPT: I'm building a cross-asset momentum report comparing tech stocks and crypto. Here's what I need: First, fetch the 90-day price history (daily interval, from 2024-09-01 to 2024-11-29) for each of the following three symbols: AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA. From each of those three price history series, identify the single trading day with the highest closing price — extract the exact date string and the close price for each. Then, get the current RSI (14-period, daily, outputsize=10) for all three symbols and record the most recent RSI value for each. Next, fetch the 90-day MACD history (daily, 2024-09-01 to 2024-11-29) for whichever of the three stocks had the EARLIEST highest-close date (i.e., the stock whose peak closing price occurred first chronologically). Also fetch the current price of BTC/USD using the exchange rate endpoint. Finally, retrieve the 30-day Bollinger Bands (daily, outputsize=20) for the same stock that had the EARLIEST highest-close date, and report: (1) that stock's ticker symbol, (2) its earliest-peak close date and price, (3) its most recent RSI value, (4) the most recent MACD value and signal line value for it, (5) the most recent upper and lower Bollinger Band values for it, and (6) the current BTC/USD exchange rate.
